ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "appliances" REAL /* Energy consumption for appliances */,
  "cooking" REAL /* Energy consumption for cooking */,
  "lighting" REAL /* Energy consumption for lighting */,
  "space_conditioning" REAL /* Energy consumption for space conditioning */,
  "water_heating" REAL /* Energy consumption for water heating */,
  "total_electricity" REAL /* Total energy consumption */,
  "natural_gas" REAL /* Energy consumption from natural gas */,
  "lpg" REAL /* Energy consumption from LPG */,
  "wood" REAL /* Energy consumption from wood */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kWh, m³) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id", "sector_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "energy_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., electricity, natural gas, LPG) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the energy source (e.g., kWh, m³) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the energy source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "end_uses" (
  "end_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each end-use */,
  "end_use_name" TEXT /* Name of the end-use (e.g., appliances, cooking, lighting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the end-use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("end_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_energy_consumption" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption for the sector in the given year */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kWh, m³) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_energy_consumption" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption from the energy source in the given year */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kWh, m³) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id", "year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "end_use_energy_consumption" (
  "end_use_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end-use */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption for the end-use in the given year */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kWh, m³) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("end_use_id", "year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year for which data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_sector" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "end_use_sector" (
  "end_use_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end-use */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("end_use_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_end_use" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "end_use_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end-use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id", "end_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_end_use" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "end_use_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end-use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "end_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_energy_source_end_use" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "end_use_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end-use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "energy_source_id", "end_use_id")
)
column_names: Indicates if the year is the current year

ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical relationships)

Name of the energy source (e.g., electricity, natural gas, LPG)

Detailed description of the energy source

Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Date and time when the user account was created
Date and time of the user's last login
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the user accessing the data

Date when the data was accessed
